title: Train, care for and ride horses for stock work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Train, care for and ride horses for stock work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare horses for work

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Select, muster, or bring from paddock, and assess the suitability of the horse for the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, muster, or bring from paddock, and assess the suitability of the horse for the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, muster, or bring from paddock, and assess the suitability of the horse for the task.

pcs.text: Catch and handle horse safely and humanely according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Catch and handle horse safely and humanely according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Catch and handle horse safely and humanely according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Assess horse for health, injury, soundness and fitness level to ensure it is capable to complete required work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess horse for health, injury, soundness and fitness level to ensure it is capable to complete required work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess horse for health, injury, soundness and fitness level to ensure it is capable to complete required work.

pcs.text: Groom horse prior to exercise or work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Groom horse prior to exercise or work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Groom horse prior to exercise or work.

pcs.text: Select, check, and maintain working equipment, according to work instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check, and maintain working equipment, according to work instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check, and maintain working equipment, according to work instructions.

pcs.text: Fit working gear to individual horse
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit working gear to individual horse?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit working gear to individual horse.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment or PPE to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare horses for work

elements.title: Train horses for stock work

pcs.text: Assess current level of education of the horse
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess current level of education of the horse?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess current level of education of the horse.

pcs.text: Train horse to calmly carry out required movements for working stock, including stops, turns and rollbacks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train horse to calmly carry out required movements for working stock, including stops, turns and rollbacks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train horse to calmly carry out required movements for working stock, including stops, turns and rollbacks.

pcs.text: Train horse to work and control a mob of livestock as a whole
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train horse to work and control a mob of livestock as a whole?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train horse to work and control a mob of livestock as a whole.

pcs.text: Train horse to safely handle a single animal and to return it to the mob safely according to industry practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train horse to safely handle a single animal and to return it to the mob safely according to industry practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train horse to safely handle a single animal and to return it to the mob safely according to industry practices.

pcs.text: Train horse to separate an animal from a mob as instructed and according to industry and animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train horse to separate an animal from a mob as instructed and according to industry and animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train horse to separate an animal from a mob as instructed and according to industry and animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Train horse to calmly accept a stock whip being used by the rider, if required by the workplace, according to industry and animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train horse to calmly accept a stock whip being used by the rider, if required by the workplace, according to industry and animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train horse to calmly accept a stock whip being used by the rider, if required by the workplace, according to industry and animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Train horse to work with working dogs where required by workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train horse to work with working dogs where required by workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train horse to work with working dogs where required by workplace.

pcs.text: Utilise agreed emergency procedures when training horses in required safety movements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Utilise agreed emergency procedures when training horses in required safety movements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Utilise agreed emergency procedures when training horses in required safety movements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Train horses for stock work

elements.title: Ride horses to carry out stock work

pcs.text: Interpret work program to determine work to be undertaken, and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret work program to determine work to be undertaken, and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret work program to determine work to be undertaken, and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select horses for the task, taking into consideration task requirements and own skill level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select horses for the task, taking into consideration task requirements and own skill level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select horses for the task, taking into consideration task requirements and own skill level.

pcs.text: Catch and handle horses safely and humanely according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Catch and handle horses safely and humanely according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Catch and handle horses safely and humanely according to animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Practise and reinforce training of horse while carrying out routine stock work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Practise and reinforce training of horse while carrying out routine stock work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Practise and reinforce training of horse while carrying out routine stock work.

pcs.text: Take corrective action to re-train horse where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take corrective action to re-train horse where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take corrective action to re-train horse where necessary.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Ride horses to carry out stock work

elements.title: Provide post-ride care and maintain saddlery and equipment

pcs.text: Remove gear, and groom, wash or clean horse according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove gear, and groom, wash or clean horse according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove gear, and groom, wash or clean horse according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Assess horse for health, injury and soundness, and administer prescribed equine vaccinations and treatments for common ailments, under supervision of the veterinarian or supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess horse for health, injury and soundness, and administer prescribed equine vaccinations and treatments for common ailments, under supervision of the veterinarian or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess horse for health, injury and soundness, and administer prescribed equine vaccinations and treatments for common ailments, under supervision of the veterinarian or supervisor.

pcs.text: Water and feed horse according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Water and feed horse according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Water and feed horse according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Release horse safely to enclosure, paddock or yard
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Release horse safely to enclosure, paddock or yard?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Release horse safely to enclosure, paddock or yard.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain working gear and riding PPE, and store according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain working gear and riding PPE, and store according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain working gear and riding PPE, and store according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Repair working gear according to industry practices and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repair working gear according to industry practices and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repair working gear according to industry practices and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Apply workplace sustainability and biosecurity practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply workplace sustainability and biosecurity practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace sustainability and biosecurity practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Provide post-ride care and maintain saddlery and equipment

elements.title: Maintain horse health and condition

pcs.text: Monitor horses as a part of daily routines to identify signs of ill health, injury and poor condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor horses as a part of daily routines to identify signs of ill health, injury and poor condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor horses as a part of daily routines to identify signs of ill health, injury and poor condition.

pcs.text: Muster or catch horses in need of attention, and report and record condition according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Muster or catch horses in need of attention, and report and record condition according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Muster or catch horses in need of attention, and report and record condition according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Administer prescribed treatments for common ailments, under supervision of the veterinarian or supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer prescribed treatments for common ailments, under supervision of the veterinarian or supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer prescribed treatments for common ailments, under supervision of the veterinarian or supervisor.

pcs.text: Safely check horse legs and feet, clean out feet, and identify lameness and its potential causes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Safely check horse legs and feet, clean out feet, and identify lameness and its potential causes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safely check horse legs and feet, clean out feet, and identify lameness and its potential causes.

pcs.text: Organise shoeing according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise shoeing according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise shoeing according to workplace procedures.
